zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ogle於1447年出生在英國諾圖波藍德喬普平頓時，她的父親William Ogle of Choppington35歲，母親Margaret Musgrave31歲。她於1459年與Jasper Bradford在英國英格蘭越可爾阿可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年在英國諾圖波藍德布拉德福德 (亞爾 莫普)享年95歲，埋葬在英國越可爾阿可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ogle于1447年出生在英国諾圖波藍德喬普平頓时，她的父亲William Ogle of Choppington35岁，母亲Margaret Musgrave31岁。她于1459年与Jasper Bradford在英国英格兰越可爾阿可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1542年在英国諾圖波藍德布拉德福德 (亞爾 莫普)享年95岁，埋葬在英国越可爾阿可。

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ogle was born in 1447, in Choppington, Northumberland, England, her father, William Ogle of Choppington, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Musgrave, was 31. She married Jasper Bradford in 1459, in Arksey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1542, in Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, England, at the age of 95, and was buried in Arksey, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Ogle est née en 1447, à Choppington, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Ogle of Choppington, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Musgrave, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Jasper Bradford en 1459, à Arksey, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1542, à Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Arksey, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Wakefield, West Yorkshire, England: Wakefield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Ogle 1447 in Choppington, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Ogle of Choppington 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Musgrave 31. Sie hat 1459 in Arksey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Jasper Bradford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1542 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, England und wurde in Arksey, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Jasper Bradford nel 1459, nel Arksey, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1542, nel Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, England, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a Arksey, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Ogleが1447年にイギリスノースウンバーランドチオップイントンで生まれた時，父William Ogle of Choppingtonは35歳，母Margaret Musgraveは31歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルクシーでJasper Bradfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年にイギリスノースウンバーランドブラドフォード (ネアル モーペス)で95歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアアルクシーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ogle(이)가 1447년 영국 노르스벌랜드 초핀그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ogle of Choppington(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Musgrave(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 아크시에서 Jasper Bradford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 영국 노르스벌랜드 브래드퍼드 (니아어 모르페스)에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 아크시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ogle nasceu em 1447, em Choppington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ogle of Choppington, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Musgrave, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Jasper Bradford em 1459, em Arksey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1542, em Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 95 anos, e foi sepultada em Arksey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Ogle родилась в 1447 г. в местности чоппингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William Ogle of Choppington было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Musgrave, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jasper Bradford в 1459 г. в местности аркси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1542 г. в местности брадфорд (нир морпет), нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности аркси, еркшир, Англия.
